Class NavigationCommands

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.command.NavigationCommands
public class NavigationCommands extends Object
Commands for moving the player around.

    • ceiling

      public void ceiling(Player player, @Arg(desc="# of blocks to leave above you",def="0") int clearance, @Switch(name='f',desc="Force using flight to keep you still") boolean forceFlight, @Switch(name='g',desc="Force using glass to keep you still") boolean forceGlass) throws WorldEditException
      Throws:
      WorldEditException

      Throws:

    • jumpTo

      public void jumpTo(Player player, @Arg(desc="Location to jump to",def="") Location pos, @Switch(name='f',desc="force teleport") boolean force) throws WorldEditException
      Throws:
      WorldEditException

    • up

      public void up(Player player, @Arg(desc="Distance to go upwards") int distance, @Switch(name='f',desc="Force using flight to keep you still") boolean forceFlight, @Switch(name='g',desc="Force using glass to keep you still") boolean forceGlass) throws WorldEditException
      Throws:
      WorldEditException
